title: EnvelopeTemplate
description: A template that defines reusable documents, recipients, tabs, and routing for envelope workflows.

templateId.description: The unique identifier of the template.

created.description: The date the template was created.

lastModified.description: The date the template was last modified.

lastUsed.description: The date the template was last used.

folderId.description: The folder ID containing the template.

folderName.description: The name of the folder containing the template.

emailSubject.description: The default email subject for envelopes using this template.

emailBlurb.description: The default email body for envelopes using this template.

documents.description: The documents included in the template.
